sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Looking at the image, the green box with W center is now at the top-left area, near the charcoal frame. Let me check its exact position and see if it's inside the charcoal frame id=4.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Green boxes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
        for c in n['children']:
            cn = seg['nodes'][c]
            print(f"    child: color={cn['color']}")

print("\nCharcoal frames:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and 10 < n['pixels'] < 100:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")

# Check containment
print("\nContainment:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and 10 < n['pixels'] < 100:
        for child_id in n['children']:
            child = seg['nodes'][child_id]
            if child['color'] == 'N':
                print(f"  Green box id={child_id} inside charcoal frame id={n['id']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

Hmm, but earlier the green box was able to move UP from the bottom-left quadrant to the top-left quadrant. So it seems like the green box hit something (probably the purple bar) and stopped.

Let me try moving UP more. From row 30 to row 9, need (30-9)/3 = 7 UP presses. But the green box might hit the purple bar again. Let me try.
Actually, looking at the image more carefully, the green box with W center is now in the top-left quadrant, just below the purple horizontal bar. The charcoal frame is above the purple bar. So the green box needs to cross the purple bar to reach the frame.
Wait, but the green box is already in the top-left quadrant (rows 30-35, cols 9-11). The purple horizontal bar is at rows 17-20. So the green box is below the purple bar, in the bottom-left quadrant. The charcoal frame is above the purple bar, in the top-left quadrant.
Hmm, but the green box was able to move UP from the bottom-left quadrant to near the purple bar. Let me try moving it UP more to see if it can cross the purple bar.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Green box with W center at [30,9]-[35,11]
# Target interior: [9,9]-[14,11]
# Need UP: (30-9)/3 = 7 presses
# The green box is below the purple bar, need to cross it

action(['UP']*7)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
